meta.title: ICS Village Running the S4x23 ICS Capture The Flag Competition
meta.description: Tom VanNorman and Don Weber join Dale to describe the ICS Capture The Flag competition they will be running at S4x23, Feb 13 - 16 in Miami South Beach.
